notes: This index points to full-page screenshots (PNG) of visually-rich pages (diagrams/tables) from the monotribe manual.
Use these images as separate 'Knowledge' assets when PDF visual content is not retrievable.
Pages beyond the English section (French/German/Spanish) contain near-duplicate diagrams; extend similarly if needed.

entries.title: Cover
entries.summary: Product photo and manual cover for Korg monotribe (Analog Ribbon Station).

entries.title: Block diagram
entries.summary: Signal-flow block diagram showing VCO + noise generator + external audio in mixed into VCF→VCA, with LFO/EG modulation, 3-part drums, sequencer, and sync I/O.

entries.title: Getting started & batteries
entries.summary: Battery installation guidance with battery compartment diagram; also explains battery level indication via step LEDs.

entries.title: Connections
entries.summary: Rear-panel jack diagram plus example cabling (AC adapter, audio in/out, headphones, sync in/out).

entries.title: Panel overview (Synthesizer section)
entries.summary: Top-panel layout diagram with numbered controls for VCO/VCF/VCA/LFO and related switches/knobs; used to map control identity and grouping.

entries.title: Panel overview (Sequencer section)
entries.summary: Top-panel layout diagram emphasizing sequencer controls (part buttons/LEDs, active step, transport, flux, gate time, etc.) with numbered callouts.

entries.title: Basic controls (step/part concept)
entries.summary: Includes small schematic mapping step buttons to ON/OFF states and illustrates how PART buttons relate to step rows.

entries.title: Sequencer behavior diagrams
entries.summary: Multiple small graphs/diagrams: FLUX ON/OFF pitch curve across steps, gate time proportions, and rhythm step behavior when holding a part button.

entries.title: Global menu
entries.summary: Tables mapping step buttons to global settings (auto power-off, battery type, sync polarity, startup sequence settings, etc.) plus setting procedure diagram.
